Class RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache
Enclosing class:
RecoderModelTransformer
public static class RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache extends Object
Cache of important data. This is done mainly for performance reasons. It contains the following info: - list of comp. units - their class declarations - a mapping from local classes to their needed final variables.

Objects are created upon the first request.
